key.name: window-width
key.description: The last saved main window width.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The last saved main window height.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window was maximized when the application last closed.

key.name: preferences-width
key.description: The last saved preferences dialog content width.

key.name: preferences-height
key.description: The last saved preferences dialog content height.

key.name: signature-database-source
key.description: Whether Drill uses the built-in signature database or a local JSON database selected by the user.

key.name: signature-database-path
key.description: The path to the user-selected local signature database JSON file.
